title: flowguard_architecture
description: Submit an Architecture Decision Record (ADR) OR record a review verdict. Mode A: provide title and adrText. Mode B: provide reviewVerdict.

title.description: Short title of the architecture decision. Required for Mode A.

adrText.description: Full ADR body in MADR Markdown format. Required for Mode A and when reviewVerdict is 'changes_requested'.

reviewVerdict.description: Review verdict. Omit for initial ADR submission.

reviewFindings.description: Structured findings from the flowguard-reviewer subagent.

reviewerUnavailable.description: Set to true when the reviewer subagent cannot be invoked.

ReviewFindings.description: Structured findings from the flowguard-reviewer subagent.
